name: lbf-human-data
description: jaxaht/lbf-human-data dataset hosted on Hugging Face and contributed by the HF Datasets community
rai:dataLimitations: This dataset contains aggregated performance metrics (avg_return, avg_episode_length) from human participants playing 4 different variants of Level-Based Foraging (LBF). The dataset is small (<1K entries), which limits statistical power. The agent_type field records the type of AI partner the human played with; the range of AI partners tested reflects the set available at study time and may not cover all possible partner strategies.
rai:dataBiases: Human participants were drawn from users with access to a computer on Prolific, which may not represent the broader population of potential users. Performance may be influenced by familiarity with game-like interfaces. Results reflect paired human-AI play and do not capture solo human baselines.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: None. No personally identifiable information, demographic data, or individual-level records are included.
rai:dataUseCases: This dataset is intended to establish human-level performance baselines for LBF benchmark tasks, enabling comparison of AI ego agent performance against human players. Validity has been established for the purpose of computing human-proxy partners in the JaxAHT benchmark.
rai:dataSocialImpact: This dataset supports fair benchmarking of AI cooperative agents by providing human performance baselines, contributing to transparent reporting of human-AI performance gaps. Positive impacts include encouraging development of AI agents that perform at or above human level in cooperative tasks. No direct negative societal impact is anticipated given the dataset's small scale and research-only scope.

prov:wasDerivedFrom.name: Jumanji Level-Based Foraging
prov:wasDerivedFrom.description: The LBF environment implementations used in this study are from the Jumanji library. The lbf_7x7_nolevels and lbf_12x12 task configurations define the cooperative foraging tasks in which human data was collected.

prov:wasGeneratedBy.name: Human Study Data Collection
prov:wasGeneratedBy.description: Human participants played paired LBF sessions on 7x7 and 12x12 maps with and without foods with varying levels, each partnered with an AI agent of a specific type (recorded in the agent_type field). Average return (avg_return) and average episode length (avg_episode_length) were computed over num_episodes episodes per participant session. Data was collected as part of the JaxAHT benchmark study.
